parties.display_name: BMO Capital Markets Corp. / Greene Holcomb & Fisher LLC

observations.summary: GHF instructed all potential buyers to submit non-binding LOIs and agreement mark-ups by July 20, 2016.
Party A expressed interest in acquiring equity in the Company.
The Board retained GHF as the Company's investment banking firm.
The Board decided to proceed with a transaction strategy and formed the Transaction Committee to supervise the process.
Party A had executed a confidentiality agreement with the Company by April 22, 2016.
G& W had executed a confidentiality agreement with the Company by April 22, 2016.
Party B had executed a confidentiality agreement with the Company by April 22, 2016.
Party C approached management and expressed interest in acquiring the Company.
Party C executed a confidentiality agreement with the Company.
Party C submitted an IOI at $21.00 per share.
G& W submitted an LOI at $21.15 per share, subject to a three-week exclusive diligence period.
Party B submitted a late-July LOI at $24.00 per share, subject to expedited diligence review.
Party E submitted a late-July LOI at $21.26 per share with a 60-day exclusivity period.
Party D submitted a late-July LOI at $21.00 per share, subject to a four-week diligence period.
Party C submitted a late-July LOI at $19.30 per share, subject to a 30-day diligence period.
Party F submitted a late-July LOI at $19.20 per share, subject to a 30-day due diligence period.
Party D submitted a revised LOI at $24.00 per share.
Party E submitted a revised LOI at $23.81 per share with financing support from Party F.
Party D indicated that it would not proceed with further due diligence after the Company declined to restrict talks with other bidders.
observations.other_detail: the Company declined to make such a commitment, at which point Party D indicated that it would not proceed with further due diligence at that time

observations.summary: G& W submitted a revised LOI at $25.00 per share in cash together with marked-up deal documents.
The Company and G& W executed the merger agreement.
The Company and G& W executed the merger agreement.
The Company publicly announced the transaction by press release before the market opened on August 15, 2016.

exclusions.explanation: The filing reports the May 19 to June 1 IOI round only in the aggregate, without identifying the bidder attached to each proposal in that range.
The aggregate late-July LOI range is superseded by the bidder-specific LOI descriptions in blocks B018 through B024.
The one strategic buyer and one financial buyer that elected not to submit LOIs are not individually identified in the filing and cannot be linked to the locked actor roster.
